title: OAP Registry Revocation Entry
description: Schema for an entry in revocations/<slug>-<receipt-hash>.json. Defined in RFC 0026 Section 5.

slug.description: Slug of the implementation whose Receipt is being revoked. MUST match an existing implementations/<slug>.json file.

revoked_receipt_sha256.description: SHA-256 of the bytes of the Receipt being revoked. MUST match the conformance_receipt_sha256 of a current or historical listing.

reason.description: Cause of revocation per RFC 0026 Section 5.

evidence_uri.description: Optional public link explaining the revocation (incident report, dispute outcome, supersession notice).

revoked_at.description: When the revocation took effect. Verifiers MUST treat the revoked Receipt as invalid for any timestamp at or after this moment.

revoked_by_did.description: DID that signed this revocation. MUST equal the listing's tool_did for self-revocation, OR a peer-witness DID for forced (Quorum) revocation.

signature.description: Ed25519 signature over the canonical JSON of this revocation with the signature field removed.

by.description: verificationMethod id used to produce the signature.

peer_witness_signatures.description: Required for forced (Quorum) revocation: at least three peer-witness signatures from current L4+ implementations, no two from the same controlling organization.
